description: Stores the master registry of non-Primary Dealer applicants and entities authorized to participate in bids.

Stores bulk applicant submission groups, linking each batch to its uploaded source document and tracking the overall maker-checker workflow status of the group.

Stores the master execution log for batch jobs within OMEGA, recording job parameters, execution timings, handlers, and final outcomes or exceptions.
